title: Family pays tribute to slain son
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The man accused of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The man accused of killing a young local with big plans to become a businessman and attorney appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court last Tuesday, 13 January, on a charge of murder.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The man accused of killing a young local with big plans to become a businessman and attorney appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court last Tuesday, 13 January, on a charge of murder."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Misumzi Nqeku (19), a matriculant of Hillcrest Secondary School who was studying human resources and business studies at the South Cape College, was fatally stabbed on his way home from a friend's late on 1 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Yamkela Mgiba (24) was arrested in connection with the incident.","html":"Yamkela Mgiba (24) was arrested in connection with the incident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nqeku's mother, Sithelwa Buti, was at home with his sister, Sinombulelo, when a colleague of Sithelwa's rushed over in the early hours of 2 January to inform them of the stabbing.","html":"Nqeku's mother, Sithelwa Buti, was at home with his sister, Sinombulelo, when a colleague of Sithelwa's rushed over in the early hours of 2 January to inform them of the stabbing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sithelwa immediately rushed out to the scene in Terrence Ndanda Street, Fairview, where she found her son dead.","html":"Sithelwa immediately rushed out to the scene in Terrence Ndanda Street, Fairview, where she found her son dead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I hoped he would wake up, but he was gone,\" said Sithelwa.","html":"\"I hoped he would wake up, but he was gone,\" said Sithelwa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Misumzi Nqeku's sister, Sinombulelo Buti, outside the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court last week. Photo: Chelsea Pieterse","html":"Misumzi Nqeku's sister, Sinombulelo Buti, outside the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court last week. Photo: Chelsea Pieterse"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She said her son had been killed just minutes before midnight, and the Da Gamaskop Police arrived a few minutes after, on 2 January. She said the police had traced and arrested Mgiba almost immediately after arriving on the scene.","html":"She said her son had been killed just minutes before midnight, and the Da Gamaskop Police arrived a few minutes after, on 2 January. She said the police had traced and arrested Mgiba almost immediately after arriving on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mgiba appeared in court for a bail application on 13 January. His family, friends and the Fairview community members gathered outside the court that morning, calling for the bail to be denied.","html":"Mgiba appeared in court for a bail application on 13 January. His family, friends and the Fairview community members gathered outside the court that morning, calling for the bail to be denied."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The matter was postponed to 28 January.","html":"The matter was postponed to 28 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sinombulelo said her brother was quiet and humble. She said he loved school, was a hard worker and had big plans for his future. He wanted to become a businessman and attorney.","html":"Sinombulelo said her brother was quiet and humble. She said he loved school, was a hard worker and had big plans for his future. He wanted to become a businessman and attorney."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sithelwa said the family is heartbroken beyond words.","html":"Sithelwa said the family is heartbroken beyond words."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
